title: The Locked Study
description: A celebrated author is found dead in his locked study. The door was bolted from the inside — yet someone got out.

victim.name: Edmund Vale
victim.description: A reclusive mystery novelist, found slumped over his desk.

suspects.name: Clara Vale
suspects.description: The victim's wife and sole heir.
suspects.alibi: Claims she was asleep upstairs all night.

suspects.name: Julian Frost
suspects.alibi: Says he left the estate before midnight.

suspects.name: Mara Inkpen
suspects.description: A ghostwriter who claims Edmund stole her work.
suspects.alibi: Insists she was at a hotel across town.

evidence.title: Bolted Door
evidence.description: The study door was bolted from the inside.

evidence.title: Open Window Latch
evidence.description: A second-floor window latch was unlatched and scuffed.

evidence.title: Torn Contract
evidence.description: A publishing contract torn in half, dated yesterday.

witnessStatements.statement: I heard a window creak around 1 a.m., but the study was always locked.

timeline.description: Edmund retires to his study and bolts the door.
A window creaks on the second floor.
The housekeeper finds the study door still bolted.

solution.motive: Revenge for being fired and cut out of royalties
solution.explanation: Julian never left. He hid, exited through the second-floor window after the murder, and let the bolted door imply an impossible crime.
